creator: tangjfn@gmail.com
text:
make bind10 fail

checking log4cplus/logger.h usability... yes
checking log4cplus/logger.h presence... yes
checking for log4cplus/logger.h... yes
checking for log4cplus library... no
configure: error: Needs log4cplus library
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to freebsd@ISC.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/dns/bind10/work/bind10-1.0.0/config.log" including the output of
the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to provide
an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/dns/bind10

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/dns/bind10
make
